title: Dutch Baked Pungent Dishes
description: A hearty and flavorful dish originating from the Netherlands, perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: 2. Tear the rye bread into small pieces and place on a baking sheet.
3. Drizzle with a little olive oil and toss to coat.
4. Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
5. In a large skillet, sauté the sliced onion and minced garlic in a little olive oil until softened.
6. Add the pungent mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
7. Season with salt, pepper, and ground cumin.
8. To assemble the dish, place the toasted bread on a serving platter or individual plates.
9. Top with the mushroom and onion mixture.
